title: LinkedIn secretely scans for 6,000+ Chrome extensions, collects data
description: A new report dubbed "BrowserGate" warns that Microsoft's LinkedIn is using hidden JavaScript scripts on its website to scan visitors' browsers for installed extensions and collect device data. [...]
author: Lawrence Abrams

title: Hims & Hers warns of data breach after Zendesk support ticket breach
description: Telehealth giant Hims & Hers Health is warning that it suffered a data breach after support tickets were stolen from a third-party customer service platform. [...]
author: Bill Toulas

title: Die Linke German political party confirms data stolen by Qilin ransomware
description: The Qilin ransomware group has claimed responsibility for an attack against Die Linke ('The Left'), forcing an IT systems outage at the political party, and threatening sensitive data leak. [...]
author: Bill Toulas

title: Evolution of Ransomware: Multi-Extortion Ransomware Attacks
description: Multi-extortion ransomware relies on stolen data to pressure victims with public leaks. Penta Security explains how its D.AMO platform keeps exfiltrated files encrypted and useless to attackers. [...]
author: Sponsored by Penta Security

title: Microsoft still working to fix Exchange Online mailbox access issues
description: Microsoft is investigating and working to resolve Exchange Online mailbox access issues that have intermittently affected Outlook mobile and macOS users for weeks. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan

title: Man admits to locking thousands of Windows devices in extortion plot
description: A former core infrastructure engineer has pleaded guilty to locking Windows admins out of 254 servers as part of a failed extortion plot targeting his employer, an industrial company headquartered in Somerset County, New Jersey. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan

title: Microsoft now force upgrades unmanaged Windows 11 24H2 PCs
description: Starting this week, Microsoft has begun force-upgrading unmanaged devices running Windows 11 24H2 Home and Pro editions to Windows 11 25H2. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan

title: CERT-EU: European Commission hack exposes data of 30 EU entities
description: The European Union's Cybersecurity Service (CERT-EU) has attributed the European Commission cloud hack to the TeamPCP threat group, saying the resulting breach exposed the data of at least 29 other Union entities. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan
